# Git Integration for Jira Data Center Documentation

> Git Integration for Jira Data Center documentation — connect your Git repositories to Jira Data Center/Server for seamless issue tracking and development visibility.

## Getting Started

- [Data Center and Server Home](https://help.gitkraken.com/git-integration-for-jira-data-center/git-integration-for-jira-home-self-manged/): Your source for Git Integration for Jira Data Center and Server documentation

## Documentation Pages
